title: Chat Application (Super Chat)
description: This is a real-time chat application where users can send messages and see when other users are typing in real time. Users can also share images and files. The application shows users’ active status as well.

title: Author's Gender Prediction
description: Developed a Natural Language Processing (NLP) model to predict the writer’s gender based on Bangla text. The system analyzes linguistic patterns and textual features to classify the probable gender of the author.

title: Notebook
description: A simple and intuitive note-taking application that allows users to create, edit, and organize their daily notes. The platform provides a seamless interface for managing personal thoughts and reminders.

title: EduMall
description: An online learning platform designed to help users acquire new language skills through structured courses and interactive content. The platform supports multiple languages, making it a comprehensive hub for language learners.

title: Movix
description: A dynamic movie streaming platform that offers a wide range of films, including the latest releases and popular titles. The application fetches movie data from the TMDB API, providing users with a seamless streaming experience.
